hero.tagline1: A full-stack developer specializing in scalable architectures and performance optimization. Based in

about.title: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a full-stack developer, I specialize in building scalable architectures and optimizing performance, with a strong focus on frontend technologies.
about.p2: I am passionate about solving complex technical challenges and mentoring developers to align technical execution with business outcomes. My goal is to create applications that enhance user experience and efficiency through collaborative leadership and innovative problem-solving.

chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Burak's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience or skills!

githubStats.title: GitHub Activity
githubStats.viewProfileAria: View the GitHub profile in a new tab

githubActivity.title: Recent Contributions
githubActivity.description: Public GitHub contribution highlights only. Stars and low-signal noise are filtered out.
githubActivity.unavailable: Recent contribution history is currently unavailable.
githubActivity.empty: No recent public contributions to show right now.

projects.title: Products and Public Build Work
projects.subtitle: Live products lead this section. GitHub adds a curated, lightweight record of the code behind them without turning the portfolio into a noisy widget grid.
projects.githubSummaryDescription: The portfolio stays product-first while still exposing public code, recent engineering activity, and a stable GitHub profile snapshot.
projects.githubSnapshotUsingPrevious: GitHub is taking a moment, so this section is keeping the last good snapshot visible.
projects.githubSnapshotUnavailableBody: GitHub data is temporarily unavailable. The profile and repository links still work.
projects.githubProfileSummary: Recent public motion clusters most around {{repoName}}, with {{count}} visible contribution updates in the last month.
projects.githubProfileFallbackDescription: The public profile and repository archive remain available even when the live GitHub snapshot takes a quiet beat.
projects.githubProfileSnapshotDescription: The profile link remains lightweight and dependable, while activity and repository signals stay curated below.
projects.githubActivityDescription: A curated read on public engineering motion: recent pushes, reviews, pull requests, and issue work without the noise of a raw GitHub feed.
projects.githubCadenceDescription: A compact view of recent public contribution cadence, tuned to feel like a portfolio signal instead of a stats widget.
projects.githubTimelineEmpty: Public GitHub activity is quiet right now, but the profile and curated repositories below remain available.
projects.repoDescription: A deliberate repository selection that adds engineering depth after the live products, without repeating the GitHub summary above.
projects.repoFallbackTitle: Repository sync is taking a quiet beat
projects.repoFallbackBody: The portfolio still links directly to the public GitHub profile while the curated repository feed refreshes in the background.
projects.showcaseDescription: The strongest proof points stay front and center: polished, branded product cards for the live apps themselves.
projects.repoDescriptionFallback: Repository notes are intentionally minimal here, so the card can still read clearly when a public description is missing.
projects.githubTeaserHint: Activity feed, contribution cadence, and curated repositories — expand to explore the engineering signal layer.
